md_windows.name: ICL3 hinge (206-216)
md_windows.notes: MD snapshots show the cpGFP barrel shearing against TM4 if the insertion starts too close to residue 206.

md_windows.name: ICL3 mid-loop (217-235)
md_windows.notes: No severe bending in the 200 ns trajectories. Good exposure of the extracellular loops.

md_windows.name: ICL3 tail (236-248)
md_windows.notes: Coupled motions begin to tug TM5; partial unfolding observed if cpGFP sits past residue 242.

rosetta_filters.name: proline_pair_clash
rosetta_filters.description: Rosetta interface_ddg rejects constructs whose linkers contain rigid Pro-Pro motifs.

rosetta_filters.name: lys_cluster_surface
rosetta_filters.description: Electrostatic filter warns when three or more Lys residues cluster inside ICL3.

assays.label: HEK293 Ca2+ flux
assays.notes: Legacy cpGFP@228 control — use as an anchor for lab-to-in-silico calibration.
